title: $CARS Stock Tickeron detected bullish Stock Pattern: Head-and-Shoulders Bottom CARS on June 24, 2025, netting in a 19.35% gain over 4 months
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
On May 06, 2025, A.I.dvisor detected a Head-and-Shoulders Bottom Pattern (Bullish) for [Cars.com](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CARS/) ([CARS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CARS/), $11.42). On June 24, 2025, A.I.dvisor confirmed the Bullish pattern, setting a target price of $13.70. 72 days later, on September 04, 2025, [CARS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CARS/) reached the target price resulting in a +19.35% for traders who took a long position in the stock.

[https://tickeron.com/news/73465958-tickeron-detected-bullish-stock-pattern-head-and-shoulders-bottom-cars-on-june-24-2025-netting-in-a-19-35-gain-over-4-months/](https://tickeron.com/news/73465958-tickeron-detected-bullish-stock-pattern-head-and-shoulders-bottom-cars-on-june-24-2025-netting-in-a-19-35-gain-over-4-months/)
